unfixed_full.note: Issue C117 requested making Business stage, budget, and timeline optional with a 'Not sure yet' option. The code implements the 'Not sure yet' option in all three dropdowns, allowing users uncertain of their decision to proceed. However, the fields remain marked required=true at the HTML level. This partial implementation was intentional per D4: 'Not sure yet' added as interim solution, final optional/required decision deferred to Kody (K4) pending business input on what sales data should collect.

unfixed_full.note: Form now suppresses native bubbles and provides per-field aria-invalid + aria-describedby with persistent inline error messages and an assertive aria-live region. However, the suggested fix specifically requested an error summary "at the top of the form listing each failed field with anchor links" — the current implementation lacks this structured summary list and places the message region at the bottom instead.
evidence: src/components/forms/PublicLeadForm.tsx:162 (noValidate)
src/components/forms/PublicLeadForm.tsx:374-375 (aria-invalid + aria-describedby on TextField)
src/components/forms/PublicLeadForm.tsx:410-411 (aria-invalid + aria-describedby on SelectField)

unfixed_full.finding: Form errors rely solely on native browser bubbles ('Please fill out this field.') with no programmatic error summary and no in-page, persistent, screen-reader-announced error list. The exploration log records 'no visible validation errors after empty submit' for the custom layer.

fix.current: Native-only required validation, transient bubbles, no error summary
fix.proposed: Add aria-invalid + aria-describedby per field with persistent inline messages, and an aria-live='assertive' error summary at the top of the form listing each failed field with anchor links

unfixed_full.note: The only code change is swapping next/image to ImageWithFallback, which handles image load failure via onError. The original issue describes cards appearing "blank on first paint until scrolled into view", which suggests initial image loading delay causes blank/empty cards. The fix does not address slow image loading or initial visibility — it only provides a fallback when images fail completely (onError). The suggested fix ("Render the first row visible on load") was not implemented.
evidence: src/components/sections/NewsList.tsx: Image → ImageWithFallback only addresses onError fallback
git diff 9cdfbed..HEAD -- src/components/sections/NewsList.tsx: only change is component swap, no visibility/animation changes
plans/ux-review-fixes/agent-runs/n13-1.md:65 claims C005 'handled-this-round' but disposition is generic 'scroll-reveal blank cards / CLS dims'
unfixed_full.finding: On first load the article cards render as blank outlines until the user scrolls (scroll-reveal animation), so the page looks broken or half-loaded above the fold.

fix.current: Article cards are invisible until scrolled into view
fix.proposed: Render the first row of article cards visible on load; only apply reveal animation to cards genuinely below the fold

unfixed_full.note: C096 (CLS 0.263 across pages) was dispositioned as "handled-this-round" in N13 triage but N10 (the responsible node) made zero code changes to fix CLS. The suggested fix (reserve space via explicit dimensions, font-display swap, fixed-height header) is not present in the code.
evidence: plans/ux-review-fixes/agent-runs/n10-1.md:60-72: N10 agent confirms footer shift is 'out of scope' and 'not fixed by design'; 'I confirmed the candidate culprits above the footer... so this is not a missing-image-dimension bug in any component. The footer shift is a dev-mode streaming/hydration artifact. REPORTED, not fixed (out of scope)'
src/components/site/Footer.tsx:15: Footer has no min-height, height, or layout stabilization CSS
src/app/globals.css:109-111: Only display:none toggle exists; no CLS-prevention CSS

fix.proposed: Reserve space for the shifting element (explicit width/height on hero/logo images, font-display swap with metric-matched fallback, fixed-height header) to bring CLS under 0.1

unfixed_full.finding: Nearly every public page reports a Cumulative Layout Shift of 0.263 (home, about, news, all three articles, privacy-free pages excepted). A CLS of 0.263 is well above Google's 0.1 'good' threshold and indicates a consistent, repeatable jump as the page settles.

fix.current: CLS 0.263 on most public routes from a shared above-fold element / font swap

unfixed_full.finding: The same 'State' field is required on /apply ('State*' with '(required)') but optional on /contact (plain 'State', no asterisk). The two forms otherwise share an identical Name/Email/Phone/City/State layout, so the differing requiredness of the identical field is an inconsistency in the form system.

fix.current: State is required on /apply but optional on /contact
fix.proposed: Decide one rule for the State field and apply it to both forms (most likely required on apply, optional on contact is defensible — but then label contact's State 'State (optional)' to make the choice intentional)
